Title: Successful user registration and homepage redirection
Preconditions:
- User is not registered in the system.
- Network connectivity is available.
Test Data:
- Valid username: `testuser123`
- Valid email: `testuser@example.com`
- Valid password: `SecurePass123!`
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Attempt to access the homepage (implicitly triggers registration check).
3. Enter `testuser123` as username, `testuser@example.com` as email, and `SecurePass123!` as password in the registration form.
4. Submit the registration form.
Expected Result:
- User is registered successfully.
- System redirects to the homepage without errors.

Title: Existing user access to homepage
Preconditions: - User `existinguser` is already registered in the system.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Enter `existinguser` as username and `ExistingPass456!` as password.
3. Submit login credentials.
Expected Result:
- System recognizes the user as registered.
- User is redirected to the homepage without requiring registration.

Title: Invalid registration due to missing fields
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Attempt to register with missing/invalid fields (leave username empty, use `invalidemail` for email, and `weak` for password).
3. Submit the registration form.
Expected Result:
- System detects missing/invalid fields.
- User is prompted to correct the errors before proceeding.
- No new user account is created.

Title: Navigate to "Homepage" via side menu
Preconditions: - User is logged in and on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click the side menu button.
2. Select the "Homepage" option from the menu.
Expected Result:
- Side menu closes.
- Homepage content is displayed without errors.

Title: Navigate to "Le mie segnalazioni" via side menu
Preconditions: - User is logged in and on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click the side menu button.
2. Select the "Le mie segnalazioni" option.
Expected Result:
- Side menu closes.
- List of alerts (if any) is displayed.

Title: Navigate to "Impostazioni" via side menu
Preconditions: - User is logged in and on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click the side menu button.
2. Select the "Impostazioni" option.
Expected Result:
- Side menu closes.
- Settings page is displayed.

Title: Invalid navigation path (e.g., clicking "Impostazioni" after "Le mie segnalazioni")
Preconditions: - User is logged in and on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click the side menu button.
2. Select "Le mie segnalazioni" (side menu closes).
3. Without returning to the homepage, attempt to click "Impostazioni" from the side menu (menu is closed).
4. Reopen the side menu and select "Impostazioni."
Expected Result:
- Side menu reopens if clicked again.
- Settings page is displayed after valid selection.

Title: Add a new alert with valid category and fields
Preconditions: - User is on the "Le mie segnalazioni" page.
Test Data:
- Category: `Safety`
- Field 1: `Noise disturbance`
- Field 2: `Apartment 101`
- Field 3: `2023-10-01`
- Field 4: `14:30`
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Add Alert" button.
2. Select the "Safety" category from the list.
3. Fill in the first four fields with the provided valid data.
4. Click the green confirmation button to submit.
Expected Result:
- System validates the fields as correct.
- Alert is added successfully.
- User is redirected to the alert list or confirmation screen.

Title: Add a new alert with invalid fields (missing data)
Preconditions: - User is on the "Le mie segnalazioni" page.
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Add Alert" button.
2. Select the "Safety" category.
3. Leave Field 1 empty and fill in the other fields.
4. Click the green confirmation button.
Expected Result:
- System detects missing/invalid fields.
- User is prompted to correct Field 1.
- Alert is not added; process loops back to the "Add Alert" step.

Title: View all alerts and select one for details
Preconditions: - User has at least one alert in the system.
Test Steps:
1. Click "View Alerts" in the side menu.
2. Verify the list of alerts is displayed.
3. Click on the first alert in the list.
Expected Result: - Detailed view of the selected alert is displayed without errors.

Title: View alerts list when no alerts exist
Preconditions: - User has no alerts in the system.
Test Steps: 1. Click "View Alerts" in the side menu.
Expected Result: - Empty state or message indicating "No alerts found" is displayed.

Title: Access profile screen and navigate to accommodations
Test Steps:
1. Click "Profile" in the side menu.
2. Click the blue house icon to navigate to accommodations.
Expected Result: - Accommodations screen is displayed with fields for editing.

Title: Save valid profile accommodation data
Preconditions: - User is on the accommodations screen.
Test Data:
- Address: `123 Main St`
- City: `Springfield`
- ZIP: `12345`
- Country: `USA`
Test Steps:
1. Fill in the accommodation fields with valid data.
2. Click the save button (blue house icon).
3. Confirm the save action.
Expected Result:
- System validates all fields as correct.
- Changes are saved successfully.
- User is redirected to the profile screen.

Title: Attempt to save profile with invalid fields
Preconditions: - User is on the accommodations screen.
Test Steps:
1. Leave the Address field empty and fill in the other fields.
2. Click the save button.
Expected Result:
- System detects invalid/missing fields.
- User is prompted to correct the Address field.
- Changes are not saved; process loops back to validation.

Title: Discard profile changes
Preconditions: - User is on the accommodations screen with unsaved changes.
Test Steps:
1. Click the discard button (if available) or navigate away without saving.
2. Confirm the discard action (if prompted).
Expected Result:
- Unsaved changes are discarded.
- User is redirected to the profile screen with original data intact.

Title: Rapid side menu clicks (race condition)
Test Steps: 1. Rapidly click the side menu button, then immediately select "Le mie segnalazioni" before the menu fully opens.
Expected Result:
- System handles the rapid clicks gracefully.
- Either:
  - Menu opens and selection is registered, or
  - Selection is ignored (no error), or
  - Menu opens to the selected option without visual glitches.

Title: Back button navigation after alert addition
Preconditions: - User is on the "Add Alert" screen.
Test Steps:
1. Partially fill the alert form (e.g., select category but leave fields empty).
2. Press the browser's back button.
Expected Result:
- User is redirected to the previous screen (e.g., "Le mie segnalazioni") without errors.
- No unsaved data is retained in the alert form.

Title: Network failure during alert submission
Preconditions:
- User is on the "Add Alert" screen with filled fields.
- Simulate network failure during submission.
Test Steps:
1. Fill all alert fields correctly.
2. Click the confirmation button while offline (or use a network simulator to block requests).
Expected Result:
- System detects the failure and displays an error message (e.g., "Network error. Please try again.").
- User is not redirected; form data is preserved for resubmission.
